name: Regular Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and shortening until well combined.
2. Add 3 eggs, one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
3. Combine flour and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the creamed ingredients, alternating with the remaining 3 eggs, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla and almond extract.
6. Pour batter into a greased, but not floured, tube pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F (or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean).
